QueryPermissionGroupRules.agName: The name of the permission group to which the queried rules belong
QueryPermissionGroupRules.arId: The identifier of the rule to query; if not provided, retrieves a batch list.
QueryPermissionGroupRules.marker: The starting position for batch list queries, a system-generated string.
QueryPermissionGroupRules.maxKeys: The maximum number of items per page, not exceeding 1000. Default value is 1000.
